generated.findings: Scattered calcified granulomas, moderate cardiomegaly, mild degenerative disc disease of the thoracic spine
generated.impression: No acute radiographic cardiopulmonary process. No active parenchymal disease.

ground_truth.findings: The heart size and pulmonary vascularity appear within normal limits. The lungs are free of focal airspace disease. No pleural effusion or pneumothorax is seen. Large hiatal hernia is present. Osteopenia and degenerative changes are present in the spine. Vascular calcification is noted. Degenerative changes are present in the right shoulder.
